cases.name: doc_anthropic_native_pdf
cases.notes: If PASS, agent could send PDFs natively instead of Tika.

cases.name: doc_openai_file_pdf
cases.notes: Some gateways translate this for the upstream provider.

cases.name: doc_image_url_with_pdf_mime
cases.description: Negative-control: PDF bytes inside an image_url data URL
cases.notes: Expected to fail. PASS would mean gateway re-derives MIME.

cases.name: multi_two_images
cases.description: Two PNG images in one stream message (red, blue)

cases.name: tools_only_on_stream
cases.description: POST /.api/completions/stream with `tools` field (no image) — does the model emit a tool call?
cases.notes: If PASS, /stream now honors tools. Removes need for BrainRouter two-step workaround.

cases.name: tools_with_image_on_stream
cases.notes: The agent's image+tools turn — currently uses two-step.
